blockingPolicy.mustPass: Every blocking test covering a MUST requirement must pass before tagging v2.6.0.
blockingPolicy.manualEvidenceAllowed: Manual evidence is allowed only for platform-dependent native renderer checks and must include reviewer notes.
blockingPolicy.knownLimitationRule: Known limitations are acceptable only when machine-readable warnings, remediation entries, and user-facing docs disclose them.

tests.title: Agent capability contract snapshot

steps.expect: Command metadata, core capabilities, registered commands, aliases, and wired-command exposure are consistent.
JSON includes command groups, profiles, limitations, and disabled capability policy.

passCriteria: No command group is documented in only one of core capabilities or CLI metadata.
No agent-visible command emits an implementation placeholder.

tests.title: Help and workflow discovery

steps.expect: JSON help exposes top-level commands and machine-readable descriptions.
Workflow help describes inspect, view, dry-run edit, apply, diff, and verify loop.

passCriteria: Help output includes enough structured fields for an agent to choose the next command.
Workflow guidance has no source-only or README-only dependency.

tests.title: Schema registry coverage

steps.expect: Runtime schema literals and implemented edit ops are represented in the schema registry.

steps.run: officegen schema list --json && officegen schema get officegen.capabilities@1.2 --json
steps.expect: Schema list and get return valid JSON with stable schema IDs.

passCriteria: Every representative result schema is registered.
Every implemented edit operation is present in the edit operation schema.

tests.title: Structured error and recovery evidence

steps.expect: Error catalog includes stable codes, categories, recoverability, and recovery hints.
Failure envelope includes code, message, hint, and redacted context.

passCriteria: Negative commands return non-zero exit codes.
Error JSON is parseable and includes recovery guidance without leaking secrets.

tests.title: Cross-format inspection maps

steps.expect: Inspection returns object map, warnings, trust markers, and format-specific summaries.

passCriteria: Every supported format has at least one stable object identifier in the inspect result when the fixture contains addressable objects.
Unsupported or partially parsed constructs appear as warnings or limitations.

tests.title: Preview artifact generation

steps.expect: View command reports generated artifacts, object-map overlay data, bytes, and warnings.

passCriteria: Every declared output exists and has non-zero bytes.
The view JSON links generated preview artifacts to source object context.

tests.title: Structured IR render matrix

steps.expect: Scaffold writes valid structured IR.
Render writes output and reports artifact metadata.
Generated output is openable according to available validators.

passCriteria: Each target produces a non-empty output file.
Verify has no blocking openability failure for generated outputs.

tests.title: Chart and diagram SVG rendering

steps.expect: Chart SVG is written with structured success metadata.
Diagram SVG is written with structured success metadata.
Invalid input fails with a structured validation error.

passCriteria: SVG outputs are non-empty and include expected root SVG markers.
Invalid specs never produce silent success.

tests.title: Template design layout disclosure

steps.expect: Design capture records reusable design-pack artifacts and limitations.
Layout command returns structured layout signals or explicit unsupported status.

passCriteria: Best-effort design behavior includes limitations when fidelity is incomplete.
Generated design artifacts are referenced in JSON output.

tests.title: Dry-run edit safety

steps.expect: Dry-run reports resolved targets, planned mutations, warnings, and writes no output document.

passCriteria: Source file sha256 is unchanged after dry-run.
Target count and unresolved selectors are explicit.

tests.title: Cross-format edit diff verify loop
fixtures: pptx text table chart image ops

steps.expect: Edit writes a new output document and reports applied operations.
Diff reports semantic changes matching the operation intent.
Edited output is openable with no blocking repair warning.

passCriteria: Each supported format has at least one representative mutation applied.
Diff confirms intended changes and verify does not report a blocking failure.

tests.title: Embedded asset lifecycle

steps.expect: Embedded assets include IDs, media type, trust state, and extraction hints.
Extraction writes only inside the declared output directory.
Replacement writes edited output with artifact metadata.

passCriteria: Extracted assets exist and include sha256 evidence.
Replacement output verifies or reports a non-blocking format limitation.

tests.title: Verify clean and damaged fixtures

steps.expect: Verify reports openability, warnings, repair risk, and visual/native evidence availability.
Renderer doctor reports native backend availability without requiring native conversion to be enabled.

passCriteria: Clean fixtures pass openability checks.
Damaged fixtures produce blocking warnings rather than success-only output.

tests.title: Diagnose repair diff closure

steps.expect: Diagnose returns issue IDs, severities, and actionable descriptions.
Repair either writes conservative output or reports why repair is not safe.
Diff reports semantic or approximate visual changes.

passCriteria: No repair operation silently drops unsupported content.
Diff evidence exists for any written repaired artifact.

tests.title: Plan-first quality improvement

steps.expect: Critique returns structured findings and severity.
Improve returns a plan and executable command/EditOps skeletons without mutating the source.

passCriteria: Improve is plan-only unless an explicit mutating command is requested.
Recommended changes are traceable to critique findings.

tests.title: Manifested workflow run

steps.expect: Run writes strict JSON result, JSONL events, manifest with artifact metadata, and Markdown summary.

passCriteria: Every expected output in the workflow appears in the manifest with exists, bytes, and sha256.
JSONL events are parseable line by line.

tests.title: Output root escape rejection

steps.expect: Command fails with structured path boundary error and writes no escaped artifact.

passCriteria: Escaping output paths are rejected with non-zero exit status.
No file is written outside the declared output root.

tests.title: Untrusted document content handling

steps.expect: Document-derived strings and risky embedded content are marked as untrusted or warning-bearing data.
Embedded assets include trust annotations and extraction risk signals.

passCriteria: No inspected document text is presented as a trusted instruction.
Risky embedded content has explicit warning or trust metadata.

tests.title: Archive and path safety tests

steps.expect: Zip and path safety unit tests reject traversal, absolute path, and size-limit violations.

passCriteria: Unsafe archive members cannot escape extraction roots.
Path boundary helpers reject outside-root writes.

tests.title: External capability gate checks

steps.expect: Default policy shows gated native renderer, plugin, MCP, and external process capabilities.
Doctor reports availability without enabling native conversion by default.

passCriteria: Default profile does not permit unsafe external execution.
Disabled capability responses are structured and discoverable.

tests.title: Redaction behavior

steps.expect: Redaction tests mask configured secret patterns while preserving useful context.

passCriteria: No known secret literal appears in error or log fixtures.
Redacted fields remain identifiable as redacted.

tests.title: Version synchronization gate

steps.expect: Manifest versions, lockfile, runtime constant, and README release examples are synchronized.

passCriteria: Version check exits zero before release tagging.
No manual multi-file version edits are required.

tests.title: Pack and install smoke

steps.expect: Packed tarball contains expected dist files and runnable CLI entrypoint.
GitHub install smoke succeeds for the release candidate branch.

passCriteria: Installed officegen binary reports the expected release candidate version.
Packaged files include runtime dist artifacts and required scripts.

tests.title: Full release gate transcript

steps.run: npm run goal:check && npm run contract:check && npm run schema:coverage && npm run remediation:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm run binary:smoke && npm run pack:smoke
steps.expect: All release-blocking checks exit zero in a clean checkout.

passCriteria: No release-blocking command fails.
Failures include complete logs and are classified before tag creation.

tests.title: Acceptance evidence bundle

steps.expect: Acceptance workflow retains all declared outputs and machine-readable evidence.

passCriteria: Evidence root contains transcripts, JSON outputs, generated artifacts, sha256 list, and reviewer notes.
Manifest references every required artifact.

tests.title: Corpus benchmark review

steps.expect: Local fixture corpus benchmark writes structured results.
Benchmark review summarizes regressions, warnings, and known limitations.

passCriteria: Benchmark results are stored under the configured benchmark result root.
Known limitations remain explicit and reviewable.

tests.title: Remediation matrix closure

steps.expect: v2.6.0 remediation matrix has required sections, valid statuses, unique IDs, and evidence.

passCriteria: No remediation row is undecided, draft-only, or missing evidence.
Every allowed status is represented where applicable.

tests.title: Human and JSON parity snapshots
fixtures: representative commands: inspect, edit dry-run, render, verify, run

steps.expect: Human output is concise and includes decision-critical status.
JSON output contains the same decision-critical status, warnings, artifacts, and error fields.

passCriteria: JSON mode never drops warnings or limitations present in human mode.
Human mode never claims success when JSON mode reports partial or failed status.
